title: circaea lutetiana subsp. canadensis
intro: Circaea lutetiana subsp. canadensis, also known as the Canadian Enchanter's Nightshade, is a plant species in the evening primrose family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Circaea lutetiana subsp. canadensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal medicine, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
